_comment: Claude Desktop — Penpot MCP via local self-hosted server, bridged with mcp-remote (stdio proxy) to the local SSE endpoint. Requires Node >=22 and the local Penpot MCP services running (4401/sse, plugin ws 4402, manifest 4400). Load the plugin manifest http://localhost:4400/manifest.json in Penpot and click 'Connect to MCP server'. See troubleshooting.md for Private Network Access browser notes.
